name: fitness-timeseries
description: Daily step count time series for 5 users over 300 days
messages: Plot each user's daily step count over time as a line chart
rubric: Must use line mark with x=date (temporal), y=steps (quantitative), color=user (nominal). 5 series visible with color legend. Some visual density is expected with 1500 points — do not penalize for overlapping lines as long as individual series are distinguishable by color. Do NOT require aggregation — each user has one row per date.
